turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hi janet , how is janet ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: good , how is the doctor ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: the doctor is good . uh , is janet ready to get started ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . so , janet is a 33-year-old female , here for some , some joint paint . what , what joint's been bothering janet , janet ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the joint pain has been mostly , um , janet's knees , actually . janet has been doing more stair type workouts , which janet thought was , you know , building muscle , uh , on janet's knees and supposed to help .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: but in turn the stair type workouts , the stair type workouts really has n't , so janet's knees have been really bothering janet .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . and is the knee pain in one knee versus the other ? or both equally ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the knee pain is both equally .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and has janet been having any other joint pain like , elbows or shoulder , or anything like that ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , but janet , janet should mention that like , janet had a rotator cuff repair about two years ago .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , but janet have n't had any problems since that point .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , and what shoulder was the rotator cuff repair on ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the rotator cuff repair was janet's right shoulder .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , all right . and , um , any pins and needles in janet's feet at all ? any swelling in janet's legs ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , no , nothing like that .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: um , but pins and needles in janet's feet would be something though janet look out for often , just because janet have diabetes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay , and janet's blood sugars have been under control ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , janet's blood sugars have been .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and has janet had any fever or chills ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , nothing like that .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . any nausea or vomiting , chest pains , shortness of breath ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , but janet do have high blood pressure , um , but janet , janet monitor high blood pressure and janet've been taking medication for high blood pressure , and high blood pressure has n't elevated , um , in any way since the joint pain .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . so , yeah , the doctor see on here that janet do take norvasc , five mg a day and janet've been taking norvasc every day-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . um , and , um , so let's go ahead and do a quick physical exam on janet . so , hey dragon , show the doctor the blood pressure . janet's blood pressure's actually pretty high today , so janet might be a little nervous here , which is not uncommon .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , so , looking at janet , janet's neck is nice and soft , there's no enlarged thyroid . janet's heart has a regular rate and rhythm . janet's lungs are clear . janet's abdomen is nice and soft , but looking at janet's knees , on janet's left knee janet do have a slight erythema and edema . there is a small efusion present over janet's left knee . um , janet have some decrease flexion and extension of janet's knee , but janet's strength in janet's lower extremities is good . uh , so let's go ahead and look at some of janet's results . the doctor know that the doctor did some x-rays when janet came in .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey dragon , show the doctor the left knee x-ray . okay , so looking at the left knee x-ray , the left knee x-ray is an , the left knee x-ray is a normal x-ray of janet's left knee , so janet may just have a little bit of a strain going on in janet's , in janet's knees there .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: uh , let's look at some of janet's labs , 'cause the doctor know that janet have the diabetes . hey dragon , show the doctor the labs . so , here janet's white blood cell count is not elevated , so the doctor'm not concerned about an infection or anything like that . um , hey dragon , show the doctor the diabetes' labs . okay and , and janet's a1c is a little elevated , but janet's a1c is not , janet's a1c is not terrible , so the doctor think for right now the doctor'll just continue janet on the current regimen . um , so the doctor's plan from janet , for janet in terms of the joint pain , um , the doctor'd like to go ahead and , you know , the doctor'll just send some autoimmune labs to work , work up janet's left knee pain and , uh , the doctor'll work for janet to do some physical therapy and the doctor'd like to go ahead and give janet anti-inflammatory medication to help with the pain . does the plan sound okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: the plan sounds great .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . hey dragon , order meloxicam 15 mg once a day . hey dragon , order a physical therapy referral . hey dragon , order an autoimmune profile . and then from a hypertension standpoint the doctor , because janet's blood pressure is a little elevated today , the doctor'd like janet to continue to monitor janet's blood pressure at home and , you know , send the doctor a report in the next couple of weeks sh- , you know , giving the doctor the , the blood pressure reportings . does janet have a blood pressure cuff at home ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , janet do .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and then , um , the doctor'll go ahead and order a lipid profile for janet . hey dragon , order a lipid profile . and then for , from a diabetes standpoint let's go ahead and , uh , continue janet on janet's metformin 500 mg twice a day . okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: does janet have any questions ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , that's it .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . the nurse will be in soon . it was good to see janet .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: nice seeing the doctor too .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey dragon , finalize the note .
